betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Strontium-90§f

§aCommon fission product — long-lived RTG power with multi-year lifespan!§f

§bStrontium-90§f (Sr-90) is a very radioactive and dangerous isotope (§e15 RAD/s§f) and a common fission product. Naturally pyrophoric from decay heat and hydroreactive.

§6Production§f:
§b• Short-Lived Nuclear Waste§f — Sr-90 makes up ~5.5% on average
§b• MOX Fuel Cycles§f — reprocessing MOX fuel in the research reactor
§b• Highly Enriched U-233 Fuel§f — research reactor fuel cycle

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• RTG Pellet§f — §e15 HE/t§f heat value; with RTG decay enabled: 208,800,000 tick lifespan (~4 real months, 43.5 years in-game), producing §e3,132 MHE§f total. Decays to zirconium.

§eTip§f: The Sr-90 RTG pellet is your best mid-to-high tier passive power source — one pellet lasts 4 real months and produces over 3 GHE total! Set up automated short-lived waste processing to maintain a steady supply!
